urdu transliteration text:
با فغان گفتا زينب محزون
Ba fughan gufta Zainab-e mahzun
Zainab, the heartbroken, cried out
@HujjatELC

english translation text: at the side of the slain King of Martyrs

urdu transliteration text:
خواهم روم بر سوي شام أي برادر جان
Khwaham rawam bar suye Sham, ay biradar jaan
I am going towards Sham, O dear Brother
@HujjatELC

با فغان گفتا كلثوم أفكار
Ba fughan gufta Kulthum-e afkaar
Kulthum, the insightful, cried ou
@HujjatELC

english translation text: at the side of the slain Lord, the Standard-bearer
O my Brother, woeful farewell! O crown of my head, woeful farewell! I am ruined!

urdu transliteration text:
با فغان گفتا ليلا با أكبر
Ba fughan gufta Layla ba Akbar
Layla cried out to Akbar
@HujjatELC

english translation text: Where is my young son, the image of the Messenger?
O my Akbar, woeful farewell! O crown of my head, woeful farewell! I am ruined!
Look at me, abandon your journey
Be mindful of my cries of burning sorrow
O consoler of my heart, woeful farewell! O (occupier of) my heart and mind, woeful farewell!! O candle on my grave.

Ba fughan gufta Zainab-e mahzun
Zainab, the heartbroken, cried out
@HujjatELC

english translation text: at the side of the slain King of the Oppressed
